footer.line: Preferences and visit stats stay in your browser by default

home.metaDescription: {brand} includes {toolCount} pure front-end developer tools for JSON formatting, Base64, timestamps, UUID, hash, regex, JWT, color conversion, and more. No login required, local-first by default.
home.heroSubtitle: All in one place, ready when you are
home.heroLead: Built for developers and daily productivity: JSON, Base64, timestamps, hashing and more in a pure front-end static site with no login required. The word <ease>Ease</ease> reflects being lightweight and smooth, so formatting, validation, and encoding tasks get done quickly in your browser.
home.sectionIndexDesc: {brand} lists tools by category below. Open a card to use a tool; new tools appear here when registered in the data layer.

about.drawerLead: {brand} site info and local preferences. For the full page, see <link>settings</link>.

settings.title: About us
settings.description: {brand} site info, tech stack, IndexedDB-based local usage insights, theme preferences, and tool operation history.
settings.lead: {brand} is built from the dev-ease repository. This page provides tech stack notes, IndexedDB-based local usage insights, and appearance preferences.

theme.title: Appearance settings
theme.desc: Theme preference is stored in IndexedDB and applied instantly.
theme.minimalDesc: Changes apply immediately; preference is saved to IndexedDB.
theme.warningNoIdb: IndexedDB is unavailable in this browser: in-memory session mode is used and settings may be lost after refresh.

usage.title: Usage behavior overview
usage.lead: Aggregated from visits on tool pages; theme reflects your current preference. Data stays local and resets when site data is cleared.
usage.idbUnavailable: IndexedDB is unavailable in this environment; stats may reflect only this session.
usage.emptyDesc: Open any tool page and visits/category shares will be aggregated here.
usage.categorySummaryDesc: Aggregates tool visits by homepage category.

toolVisit.title: Local visit records
toolVisit.note: Stored only in your local browser (IndexedDB), never uploaded to a server.

toolHistory.title: Operation history
toolHistory.desc: Stored only in local IndexedDB, up to {max} records per tool; clearing site data removes it.
toolHistory.empty: No records yet. Actions like opening this page or copying output will appear here automatically.
toolHistory.confirmClear: Clear all local operation history for this tool? This action cannot be undone.

relatedTools.title: Related tools
relatedTools.desc: Related capabilities in this site for continuous workflows.

jsonFormatter.tip: Tip: very large JSON may slow down the page; handle sensitive data in a trusted local environment.
jsonFormatter.usageLi1: When input changes on the left, parsing is attempted in real time.
jsonFormatter.usageLi2: The copy buttons correspond to formatted and minified outputs.

uuid.tip: Tip: up to 50 UUIDs per run to avoid UI lag.

timestamp.inputLabel: Timestamp (leave empty to use current time)
timestamp.emptyHint: Enter a timestamp or click Fill current time.
timestamp.tip: Tip: auto mode uses length rules for numeric strings; for other formats, normalize to seconds or milliseconds first.

textCounter.tip: Tip: words are counted by whitespace separation; mixed CJK/English text follows space-based tokenization.

passwordGenerator.chooseOne: Select at least one character group.

jwtInspector.threePartsError: JWT must include three parts: header.payload.signature

unicodeInspector.tip: Note: iterating with `for...of` handles most emoji (surrogate pairs) correctly; combining marks may still span multiple rows.

regexTester.tooLong: Text too long: keep it within {max} characters (to reduce ReDoS risk).
regexTester.tipSuffix: you usually get only the first match; include g for global matches.

cryptoHash.webCryptoUnavailable: Web Crypto is not available in this environment (requires secure context: HTTPS or localhost).
cryptoHash.webCryptoUnavailableBanner: Current page environment unavailable: `crypto.subtle` requires HTTPS or localhost.
cryptoHash.tip: Tip: very large text may take longer; handle sensitive content in a trusted local environment.

colorConverter.tip: Tip: color space conversion has rounding errors; use design source-of-truth for print/brand colors.

guides.metaDescription: {brand} short guides on developer-tool workflows, privacy, and local-first practices.
guides.indexLead: Short reads on typical workflows, privacy, and local-first usage; more articles over time.

local-first-json-workflow.title: Local-first: Why JSON Feels Safer When Processed in Your Browser
local-first-json-workflow.description: From API integration and privacy compliance to offline scenarios—explain the value of validating and formatting JSON in the browser, and how it pairs with DevEase's JSON tools and local storage.

localFirst.title: Local-first: Why JSON Feels Safer When Processed in Your Browser
localFirst.description: From API integration and privacy compliance to offline scenarios—explain the value of validating and formatting JSON in the browser, and how it pairs with DevEase's JSON tools and local storage.
localFirst.p1: When you're integrating APIs or organizing configuration files, JSON often contains field names, business identifiers, or even real data after masking. Uploading the same content to an unknown server for formatting adds an extra exposure path; but when you process it in your local browser, parsing and formatting happen without sending data to your backend—and it's also convenient in offline or intranet environments.
localFirst.p2: {brand}'s JSON Formatter / Minifier runs JSON.parse and serialization on the client. Error messages come from the native implementation, making it easy to quickly spot illegal commas or quotes. If you’re also interested in which tools you used and which steps you performed, check the IndexedDB-based visits and operation history in each tool's sidebar (stored only on your device; clearing site data removes it too).
localFirst.p3: In practice, handle sensitive payloads on trusted devices and with trusted browser settings. On shared computers, close the tab right after you’re done and avoid exposing tokens in screenshots. For more details about data scope, see About us.
localFirst.li1: Browser-side JSON handling can reduce unnecessary outbound paths.
localFirst.li2: Together with local visits and operation history, it's easier to build the expectation that data stays with you.
localFirst.li3: For stronger guarantees, still combine system and network security policies—not just rely on front-end tools.

text-data.title: Text & Data
text-data.description: Statistics, diff, Unicode, and structured data (JSON, etc.).

encoding.title: Encoding & Network
encoding.description: Base64, URL, HTML, QR codes, and common encoders/decoders.

time-id.title: Time & Identifiers
time-id.description: Time conversions and unique identifier generation.

security-dev.title: Security & Debugging
security-dev.description: Passwords, JWT, hashes, regex, and more (processed in the browser; not a replacement for server-side validation).

json-formatter.title: JSON Formatter / Minifier
json-formatter.description: Validate JSON; format (2-space indent) or minify into a single line.

text-counter.title: Text Counter
text-counter.description: Count characters, words, and lines; visit stats are stored locally.

text-diff.title: Text Diff (Line-level)
text-diff.description: Compare two texts line by line and highlight additions/deletions.

unicode-inspector.title: Unicode Code Point Viewer
unicode-inspector.description: Show code points, U+ values, and UTF-16—useful for debugging emoji.

base64.title: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.description: Base64 encode/decode with stable UTF-8 text.

html-entities.title: HTML Entities Encode / Decode
html-entities.description: Escape or restore common entities like < > &.

qr-code.title: QR Code Generator
qr-code.description: Generate QR code images from text or links (rendered locally).

timestamp.title: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.description: Convert Unix timestamps and readable times; supports seconds/milliseconds.

password-generator.title: Random Password Generator
password-generator.description: Configurable length and character set; uses `crypto` randomness.

jwt-inspector.title: JWT Decoder
jwt-inspector.description: Decode header/payload; does not verify signatures.

regex-tester.title: Regex Tester
regex-tester.description: Debug regex by listing matches and capture groups.

color-converter.title: Color Converter
color-converter.description: Convert HEX / RGB / HSL with a preview.
